title: Created Facemash
description: Coded Facemash, a Harvard college photo rating website that served as the architectural predecessor to Facebook.

title: Launched Facebook
description: Launched Thefacebook.com from his Harvard dorm room with co-founders Eduardo Saverin, Andrew McCollum, Dustin Moskovitz, and Chris Hughes.

title: Facebook IPO & Instagram Buy
description: Completed Facebook's initial public offering (IPO) and acquired mobile photo-sharing network Instagram.

title: WhatsApp Acquisition
description: Acquired mobile messaging application WhatsApp for $19 billion to expand Google-scale chat infrastructure.

title: Rebranded to Meta
description: Rebranded the parent company to Meta Platforms, shifting corporate focus toward spatial computing (metaverse) and AI.
